name: Red Hook

ingredients.ingredient: Punt e Mes (or other sweet vermouth)

spec.method_detail: Stir with ice until well-chilled. Strain into chilled coupe.

history: Vincenzo Errico created the Red Hook at Milk & Honey in New York around 2003, named for the Brooklyn neighborhood. It's a Brooklyn variation — same ingredients, different ratios — and part of the 'Greenpoint,' 'Carroll Gardens,' and 'Bensonhurst' family of Brooklyn-neighborhood cocktails. The Punt e Mes adds a bitter edge to the maraschino sweetness.
